java.awt.print/Pageable/UNKNOWN_NUMBER_O.name: UNKNOWN_NUMBER_OF_PAGES
java.awt.print/Pageable/UNKNOWN_NUMBER_O.description:
This constant is returned from thegetNumberOfPagesmethod if aPageableimplementation does not know
the number of pages in its set.
